100 hours spent on unsuccessful coffee chats

 

0 meal swipes used at Chef Don’s

-1 net study hours recorded in study rooms

17 “Construction will be done soon” announcements received

24 questions asked at networking events

22 “shhh” interruptions endured during finals week

4 calculus exams bombed

17 pregames attended

5 documented falls on the Earl stairs

103 chocolate chip cookies smuggled out of Fac House

90,000 grams of protein consumed

5 trauma-bonded lifelong friendships formed

1 graduation almost at Baker

30 hours spent in elevator queues

7 spikeball impacts sustained

 

300 Flex dollars spent at Café East in the last week of school

11 suspected JJ’s food poisoning incidents

11 suspected JJ’s Place food poisoning incidents

11 suspected JJ’s Place food poisoning incidents

9 all-nighters completed

Graphic by Ava Fung
